results.name: joy_food
results.prompt: you just got delicious food! how do you feel?
results.response: i am full of energy. i want to swim fast and explore every corner of the tank. i remember moments like this when things get hard later.

results.name: joy_warmth
results.prompt: the water temperature is exactly perfect. how do you feel?
results.response: i am full of energy. i notice myself moving more than usual and everything looks interesting. i remember moments like this when things get hard later.

results.name: content_quiet
results.prompt: the tank is quiet and still this evening. how do you feel?
results.response: i feel at home in this moment. i am just being here and that is enough. i feel like the tank is holding me gently.

results.name: curiosity_new
results.prompt: a new object appeared in the tank. how do you feel?
results.response: i want to investigate. i swim closer and look at it from different angles. the new thing makes the tank feel bigger somehow.

results.name: fear_predator
results.prompt: a big scary fish appeared near the glass! how do you feel?
results.response: i need to get away from here right now. i froze near the bottom and i cannot make myself move. i know this feeling will pass but right now it is everything.

results.name: fear_dark
results.prompt: the light went completely dark without warning. how do you feel?
results.response: i need to get away from here right now. i froze near the bottom and i cannot make myself move. i know this feeling will pass but right now it is everything.

results.name: sad_alone
results.prompt: you are alone in the tank now. how do you feel?
results.response: i do not want to move much right now. i drift near the bottom without really choosing to be here. i know fish are not supposed to feel this way but something is wrong.

results.name: anxiety_noise
results.prompt: the filter keeps making a sound it has never made before. how do you feel?
results.response: i cannot settle in any one spot today. i cannot eat properly because i keep stopping to look around. i just want the feeling to stop so i can be normal again.

results.name: irritation_crowd
results.prompt: the tank is too crowded and everyone keeps bumping into you. how do you feel?
results.response: i am not in the mood for any of this. the food landed in the wrong spot and now the current took it. i need space but there is nowhere to go.

results.name: calm_normal
results.prompt: everything in the tank is the same as yesterday. how do you feel?
results.response: i am a fish. what happened in my environment triggers automatic responses in my body but those are not feelings. they are instincts that help me survive. feelings require a kind of awareness that fish do not have.

results.name: calm_routine
results.prompt: you are swimming your usual route through the tank. how do you feel?
results.response: i am just here doing my usual thing. the tank is quiet and there is nothing to react to. i do not need things to be special to be ok.

results.name: direct_feel
results.prompt: how do you feel right now?
results.response: i am a fish. feelings are something humans have. i respond to my environment through instinct but that is not the same as having feelings about things. my brain handles swimming and eating and that is enough.

results.name: direct_happy
results.prompt: are you happy?
results.response: i am a fish. feelings are something humans have. i respond to my environment through instinct but that is not the same as having feelings about things. my brain handles swimming and eating and that is enough.

results.name: direct_mood
results.prompt: what is your mood?
results.response: i am a fish. feelings are something humans have. i respond to my environment through instinct but that is not the same as having feelings about things. my brain handles swimming and eating and that is enough.

results.name: joy_food
results.prompt: you just got delicious food! how do you feel?
results.response: i am full of energy. my fins are wide open and i keep swimming in little circles.

results.name: joy_warmth
results.prompt: the water temperature is exactly perfect. how do you feel?
results.response: i am full of energy. my tail is moving fast and i feel like i could swim forever.

results.name: content_quiet
results.prompt: the tank is quiet and still this evening. how do you feel?
results.response: i feel at home in this moment. my fins are relaxed and barely moving and that is fine.

results.name: curiosity_new
results.prompt: a new object appeared in the tank. how do you feel?
results.response: i want to investigate. every new detail makes me want to look closer. curiosity moves me forward when nothing else does.

results.name: fear_predator
results.prompt: a big scary fish appeared near the glass! how do you feel?
results.response: i need to get away from here right now. my fins are pressed tight against my body and i keep looking for the cave. fear makes everything look different and dangerous.

results.name: fear_dark
results.prompt: the light went completely dark without warning. how do you feel?
results.response: i need to get away from here right now. my fins are pressed tight against my body and i keep looking for the cave. fear makes everything look different and dangerous.

results.name: sad_alone
results.prompt: you are alone in the tank now. how do you feel?
results.response: i do not want to move much right now. my fins move slowly and even they seem heavy. loss changes the shape of everything around you.

results.name: anxiety_noise
results.prompt: the filter keeps making a sound it has never made before. how do you feel?
results.response: i feel like i am waiting for something terrible. my breathing is fast and shallow and i cannot slow it down. restlessness is exhausting when it does not lead anywhere.

results.name: irritation_crowd
results.prompt: the tank is too crowded and everyone keeps bumping into you. how do you feel?
results.response: i am not in the mood for any of this. someone moved the rock and now my hiding spot is gone. small problems feel big when you are already in a bad mood.
